scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @staging/shared && npm run build --workspace @staging/web && npm run copy:web && npm run build --workspace @staging/server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --workspace @staging/shared && npm run test --workspace @staging/server && npm run test --workspace @staging/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @staging/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @staging/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @staging/web && npm run typecheck:e2e
